svg.text: • 56. Merge Intervals — the canonical problem; sort by start, merge overlapping
• 57. Insert Interval — pre-sorted input; insert and merge in O(n) without re-sort
• 986. Interval List Intersections — two sorted lists, intersect by walking both
• 1288. Remove Covered Intervals — sort, count those not covered by previous
• 759. Employee Free Time — merge schedules across employees, find gaps
• 729 / 731 / 732. Calendar I / II / III — incremental booking with k-overlap detection
• 252. Meeting Rooms — can attend all? Sort, check pairwise overlap
• 253. Meeting Rooms II — minimum rooms; heap-of-ends or sweep-line
• 435. Non-overlapping Intervals — greedy, sort by end, count removals
• 452. Min Arrows to Burst Balloons — same as 435, sort by end, count groups
• 218. The Skyline Problem — sweep-line over rectangle edges, max-heap of heights
• 1851. Minimum Interval to Include Each Query — offline sort + heap
When the input is intervals, sort first — the right key is half the answer.
